rows.label: qev060802_MSG0049
rows.name:
Right now, my friend Nokocche is
repairing my backpack for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0050
rows.name:
But he's been groaning "hmmm, hmmm" for
a while now... Can he really fix it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0051
rows.name:
You're going to get the materials
to repair the backpack for us,
right? Thank you so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0052
rows.name:
Between Nokocche and you,
there are so many kind and
wonderful aliens in this city![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0001
rows.name:
Nokocche won't wake up at all! Ugh...
what in the world happened...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_JNK0010
rows.name: Deduce

rows.label: qev060802_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask if it's possible he inhaled Voltant.

rows.label: qev060802_JNK0020
rows.name: Calm

rows.label: qev060802_SEL0021
rows.name: Calm Atheron down.

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0002
rows.name:
I see... It was leaking from
the backpack, wasn't it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0003
rows.name:
Nokocche was looking at it
here this whole time, so he
must have inhaled it then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0004
rows.name:
Yeah... You're right, there
has to be some cause...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0005
rows.name: ………… Ah... could it be...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0006
rows.name:
He might have inhaled the Voltant
that was leaking from my backpack...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0007
rows.name:
...That must be it... Nokocche
was looking at the backpack here
this whole time, after all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hey... I'm sorry, but could you go to Kurogane
no Tairiku and gather some native Mottled Figs
and an ore called Parhelion Platinum?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0009
rows.name:
If I make Revoltant Extract
with those... I should definitely
be able to save Nokocche.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'm begging you... He's the first friend
I made since coming to this city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0011
rows.name:
To kill such a friend with sacred
Voltant... I couldn't bear it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0012
rows.name:
He was looking after my backpack
so attentively the whole time.
That's why the Voltant got to him...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Please. Get the Mottled Figs and
Parhelion Platinum. I will save
Nokocche with them no matter what.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hey, how is it? Did you find the
Mottled Figs and Parhelion Platinum!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0015
rows.name:
Nokocche's... complexion is
getting worse and worse...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0016
rows.name: Yes, this is it! If I absorb this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0017
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0018
rows.name:
Ugh... aah...! ...The Voltant is
coursing through... my body...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0019
rows.name:
I will definitely save... my
best friend's life... Ugh...
if I give this to Nokocche...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0020
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0022
rows.name: ...Huh? Was I... sleeping?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev060802_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask what exactly Atheron just did to Nokocche.

rows.label: qev060802_JNK0040
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev060802_SEL0041
rows.name: Express concern for Nokocche's physical condition.

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0023
rows.name:
I removed the Voltant inside
Nokocche using the extract
produced when revoltanting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0024
rows.name:
It requires a special mixture... and it
was my first time doing this to an alien,
but I'm glad it worked out well![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Hm? Thanks to having a good sleep,
I feel even more energetic than usual,
but... did something happen?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0026
rows.name:
Yeah, it seems the Voltant was removed
properly. Ah... I'm so glad it worked![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0027
rows.name:
...Hmm, I don't quite understand, but
I assume everything is resolved?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0028
rows.name:
Atheron, how is the condition of the
backpack? Are there any problems?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0029
rows.name:
No problems at all, thank
you! More importantly, how
is your body doing, Nokocche?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0030
rows.name:
Perhaps thanks to sleeping well,
it is in excellent condition.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0031
rows.name:
I see... This is all thanks to
this person helping out too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0032
rows.name: Yes, we must offer our thanks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0033
rows.name:
...This is a physical manifestation
of gratitude from myself and
Atheron. Please accept it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0034
rows.name:
Still... from now on, I'm going
to do the maintenance on my
backpack very thoroughly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0035
rows.name:
If a Voltant leak happened in
the middle of NLA, it could
develop into a massive incident...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_JNK0050
rows.name: Concern

rows.label: qev060802_SEL0051
rows.name: Express worry about whether NLA would be harmed.

rows.label: qev060802_JNK0060
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev060802_SEL0061
rows.name: Express concern for Atheron and the others.

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0036
rows.name:
Constantly being conscious of the whole like that
is, how should I put it, very Zaruboggan-esque. It
seems you would get along well with my brethren.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0037
rows.name:
But... if a massive incident
actually occurred, we would
surely be banished from here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0038
rows.name:
Even though we've finally become friends
with Earthlings and wonderful Ma-non like
this... I absolutely don't want that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0039
rows.name:
...Rest assured. I have completely
grasped the structure of that backpack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0040
rows.name:
From now on, no matter how it
breaks, I will repair it for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0041
rows.name:
Therefore, you can stay in this
place forever. There is no need
to worry about such things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0042
rows.name: ...Thank you, Nokocche.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0043
rows.name:
I feel a new kind of connection
with you, different from the
bond I share with my brethren.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0044
rows.name:
...You also seem somewhat like
Nokocche. Worrying about someone
like me rather than yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0045
rows.name:
...Thank you. But we take
pride in these bodies bestowed
upon us by Lord Golbogga.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0046
rows.name:
So I don't think of it as painful. I
have to revoltant more and more things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0047
rows.name:
Hmm... It's an emotion I find hard to
understand, but as long as you can stay
energetic, that's what matters most.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060802_MSG0048
rows.name:
Besides... I've made such a
wonderful friend. I'm sure we'll
do just fine in this city.[ST:wait ]
